findings.description: The source explicitly states "コードIDに対応するコード値が2件の場合と、2件以上ある場合の実装例を下記に示す" indicating two distinct JSP implementation examples are present in the full source. The knowledge file section s6 contains only the attribute table with no code examples, unlike s3/s4/s5 which all include JSP code examples. Code examples that demonstrate correct usage patterns are decision-necessary information.
findings.source_evidence: codeCheckboxタグ section: "コードIDに対応するコード値が2件の場合と、2件以上ある場合の実装例を下記に示す。" (appears before the attribute table; the implementation examples that follow are absent from s6)
